hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'kubectl[[:space:]]+([^|;&]*[[:space:]])?delete[[:space:]]+(pod|pods)([[:space:]]|$)' && echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(-n[[:space:]]+carher|--namespace[[:space:]]*=?[[:space:]]*carher)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: 禁止手动 kubectl delete pod -n carher（CLAUDE.md 零中断规则）。改用 kubectl rollout restart deployment/<name> 或 patch image。如真要删，在命令前手动加 # confirmed-zero-downtime-override 注释绕过本 hook。' >&2; echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'confirmed-zero-downtime-override' && exit 0 || exit 2; fi; exit 0

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(ssh|scp|rsync)[[:space:]]+([^|;&]*[[:space:]])?(root@47\.84\.112\.136|root@43\.98\.160\.216)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: 禁止直连堡垒机（root@47.84.112.136 / root@43.98.160.216）。必须走 scripts/jms 包装器，见 k8s-via-bastion skill。例：scripts/jms ssh AIYJY-litellm ...' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0
